channel.title: Machine Learning on Utsab's Digital Garden
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on Utsab's Digital Garden

item.title: Decision Trees (A comprehensive Note)
item.description: Based on StatQuest with Josh Starmer: “Decision and Classification Trees, Clearly Explained!!!” and “Decision Trees, Part 2 — Feature Selection and Missing Data”, supplemented with additional theory and pointers. Table of Contents What is a Decision Tree? Anatomy of a Tree How to Read a Decision Tree Building a Tree From Scratch Impurity Metrics Gini Impurity Entropy and Information Gain Gini vs. Entropy — When to Use Which Handling Continuous/Numeric Features Handling Categorical Features Feature Selection — Part 2 Content Handling Missing Data Overfitting and Pruning Regression Trees (Brief) Key Properties and Gotchas Practical Pointers (sklearn) Where Decision Trees Lead — the Bigger Picture What is a Decision Tree?
